# Transcrição: Part 3 Adding Tracking Codes And Stuff To Clickfunnels

- **Fonte:** Part 3 Adding Tracking Codes And Stuff To Clickfunnels
- **Duração:** 01:19

## [00:00 - 01:19]

Hey there, it's Irene Aziz and in this video I'm going to show you how to add a tracking pixel to your funnel. Now there are two places that you can add your tracking pixel and we're going to go over both of them. So first what you're going to need is a tracking pixel from your service provider and you will also need a funnel. So you'll go into your funnel and you could add a tracking pixel inside the editor. You will go edit a page, you will go under the settings tab and go ahead and select tracking code. Once you have selected the tracking code you'll see there's two areas you could add your tracking code, either the header code or the footer code. Your provider will let you know whether you should be adding the code to the header or the footer. You will then go ahead and paste your pixel inside the tracking code. The second place that you can go ahead and add the tracking code would be on the setting level. So this would be for the entire funnel and you can go ahead and add this code right over here under the head tracking code just like that and then scroll down, save and update the settings. If you run into any trouble with your pixel you can go ahead and reach out to our support team. We'd be more than happy to help. Thanks so much.
